description_long: This is a cylindrical beverage can with a vibrant, modern design. The can features a gradient background transitioning from orange at the top to red at the bottom, overlaid with a dotted halftone pattern. The front displays the bold, stylized text 'KOSMIC COLA' in white with a red outline, set against a swirling, abstract graphic. The top of the can is metallic silver, typical of aluminum cans, and the sides are smooth and seamless. The can's surface is glossy, reflecting light and emphasizing the vivid colors. There are no visible openings, tabs, or nutritional labels on the visible sides.
description: A glossy, cylindrical can with a bold 'KOSMIC COLA' logo and a vibrant orange-to-red gradient design.
description_view_0: Partial view of the 'KOSMIC COLA' logo with swirling graphics and a gradient background.
description_view_1: Back view showing the uninterrupted orange-to-red gradient and dotted pattern, with no text or graphics.
description_view_2: Side view with a sharp division between the orange gradient and a dark, abstract section; no visible text.
description_view_3: Full front view of the can, prominently displaying the 'KOSMIC COLA' logo and dynamic swirling graphics.
attribute_brand_logo: The logo 'KOSMIC COLA' is prominently displayed on the front, with bold white letters outlined in red, set against a swirling orange and red background.
